prompt_text: Write a recommendation letter for Mei who is applying to a design program. Mention creativity and iteration based feedback.
response_text:
[Your Name]
[Your Title/Position]
[Your Institution/Company]
[Date]

[Recipient's Name]
[Recipient's Title]
[Design Program Name]
[Design Program Address]

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am writing to wholeheartedly recommend Mei for admission to the esteemed [Design Program Name]. As a dedicated educator and mentor, I have had the pleasure of observing and guiding Mei's growth as a designer, and I can confidently attest to her exceptional creativity, innovative thinking, and commitment to excellence.

During Mei's time at [Institution/Company], I had the opportunity to work closely with her on various projects, and her exceptional design skills and creative vision consistently impressed me. Mei possesses an innate ability to think outside the box and push boundaries, often arriving at innovative solutions that are both aesthetically pleasing and functionally effective. Her passion for design is contagious, and she has a unique ability to inspire and motivate her peers.

One of Mei's greatest strengths is her willingness to take feedback and use it as an opportunity for growth. She embodies the spirit of iteration-based feedback, embracing constructive critique as a chance to refine and improve her work. Her eagerness to learn from others and incorporate feedback into her design process is a testament to her humility, dedication, and commitment to delivering outstanding results.

Throughout her academic journey, Mei has consistently demonstrated a keen sense of curiosity, a willingness to take risks, and a passion for exploring new ideas and techniques. Her portfolio showcases a diverse range of projects that demonstrate her versatility, creativity, and ability to adapt to different design contexts.

I have no doubt that Mei would be an invaluable addition to the [Design Program Name] community. Her exceptional talent, creativity, and dedication to excellence make her an ideal candidate for this esteemed program. I am confident that she will thrive in this environment and make significant contributions to the design world.

In my opinion, Mei has what it takes to succeed in the highly competitive field of design. Her creativity, passion for learning, and commitment to iteration-based feedback make her an exceptional candidate. I strongly recommend Mei for admission to the [Design Program Name] and am confident that she will excel in this program.

If you require any additional information, please do not hesitate to contact me. I would be more than happy to discuss Mei's qualifications further.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title/Position]
[Your Institution/Company]
